gallery.title: OUR STORY
about.title: More than a restaurant
about.subtitle: Tradition, taste, and summer magic.
about.text_1: Sky Restaurant & Pool Bar was born from a vision to create a unique place where fine dining meets a relaxed summer atmosphere. Nestled in the heart of nature, we offer an escape from the ordinary.
about.text_2: Our team uses only the freshest ingredients to prepare dishes that awaken all the senses. Whether you seek a romantic dinner, a family lunch, or relaxation by the pool – Sky is your destination.
